creator: tz@freebsd.org
text:
Aloha,

when i try to "pkg install devel/forge" it wants to remove my Emacs and replace it with Emacs-Devel. There is a whole bunch of dependency issues, here the output of the above result:

Updating FreeBSD repository catalogue...
